_comment: REPRESENTATIVE captured-geometry fixture (NOT synthetic). Main window on a single 4K monitor at 150% scale. outer/inner positions are physical px (large because physical 4K space); anchor rect is CSS px (logical). Expected = client-origin (physical) + anchor*1.5. Confirms the size and offset both scale by the host monitor's factor.
description: single monitor, 150% scale (4K), decorated main window
